feature: API Credentials Reference Guide and In-App Credentials Management Dashboard
summary: Verified both backend API endpoint and frontend UI for API Credentials Manager feature. All 14 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend Platform Connections tab working with all features: status bar, connected/available platforms, expand/collapse, credential fields with eye toggle, search filter, and Connect button state management.

credentials_guide_endpoint.test: All 10 expected platforms present (youtube, twitter_x, tiktok, soundcloud, vimeo, bluesky, discord, telegram, instagram, facebook)
Each adapter has required fields (platform_id, platform_name, fields, developer_portal, developer_portal_label, setup_summary, cost)
Correct credential fields per platform (e.g., Telegram has bot_token+chat_id, Bluesky has handle+app_password)
Credential fields have required properties (key, label, placeholder, type, help)
Developer portal URLs are valid HTTP/HTTPS URLs

platform_connection_endpoints.test: Connect and disconnect platform flow works

platform_connections_tab.test: Platform Connections tab loads with API Credentials Manager UI
Status bar shows Connected, Available, and Live Adapters counts
Connected platforms section shows SoundCloud with Disconnect button
Available platforms lists all 9 unconnected platforms

expand_collapse_functionality.test: Telegram expands showing Quick Setup and credential fields
Bluesky expands showing handle and app_password fields
Developer portal links present in expanded view
expand_collapse_functionality.details: @BotFather on Telegram, Bluesky App Passwords, Discord Webhooks Guide

credential_field_features.test: Password fields have eye toggle for show/hide
Fields show placeholder text from API
Fields show help text from API

connect_button_state.test: Connect button disabled when fields empty
Connect button enabled when all required fields filled

search_filter.test: Filter platforms input filters available platforms by name

platforms.name: Twitter/X
platforms.cost: Free tier: 1,500 tweets/mo; Basic ($100/mo) for media uploads

critical_code_review_comments: Backend endpoint /api/distribution-hub/adapters/credentials-guide correctly returns all 10 platforms without requiring auth
Frontend PlatformConnectionsTab correctly fetches and displays credentials guide from API
CredentialField component properly handles password visibility toggle
Connect button state management works correctly - disabled until all required fields filled
Search/filter functionality works to narrow down available platforms
All data-testid attributes present for automated testing
seed_data_creation: None - used existing data. SoundCloud was already connected for testing.

mocked_api.description: No APIs are mocked. The credentials guide endpoint returns real adapter data from platform_adapters.py

context_for_next_testing_agent: API Credentials Manager feature complete. Platform Connections tab at /distribution-hub shows API Credentials Manager UI with 10 live adapter platforms. Each platform shows credential requirements, developer portal links, and Quick Setup instructions. Connect/disconnect flows work correctly. Filter search works to narrow platforms.
